"C:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\financial_tracker.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\financial_tracker.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\financial_tracker.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\financial_tracker.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o financial_tracker.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libfinancial_tracker.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\financial_tracker.dir\linkLibs.rsp
